data.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: RED tests confirmed. Three failing tests: test_ticket_prefix_derivation (needs 'ticket' AND 'prefix'), test_ci_workflow_examples (needs 'example' AND 'workflow'), test_acli_auto_suggestion (needs 'ACLI_VERSION' or 'acli-version-resolver'). Note: test_config_generation_section and test_config_key_categories are already GREEN (SKILL.md has 'config' and 'dso-config.conf' references, and 'test', 'ci', 'commands', 'design', 'format' words already exist in the file).
